title: stachys malekiana
intro: Stachys malekiana, also known as Iranian sage or Iranian betony, is a perennial plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally used in Iranian folk medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stachys malekiana include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve cognitive function, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia. Herbal preparations of Stachys malekiana can be found in teas, infusions, and capsules, and are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
